violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Sanitizer spray found with less than 150ppm Quat solution.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. -Delivery bag set on top of exposed/food side of small box flats. *COS-Redirected immediately and disposed of top box flats.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Residue/crumbs in container and on bag clip at top of make line. -Residue/debris at prep table door handles and edges. -Residue build up on spice shakers. -Residue at walk in cooler door handle. -Dust/debris at walk in cooler fans.
Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder or bar soap. -Hand soap is out at hand sink next to dish pit.
Laundered, proper handling, and storage (1 pt deducted)
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
